title: National Sickle Cell Awareness Day Act
title_en: National Sickle Cell Awareness Day Act
short_name: National Sickle Cell Awareness Day Act
description: National Sickle Cell Awareness Day Act (National Sickle Cell Awareness Day Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the National Sickle Cell Awareness Day Act .

provisions.title: National Sickle Cell Awareness Day
provisions.content: 2 Throughout Canada, in each and every year, the nineteenth day of June is to be known as “National Sickle Cell Awareness Day”.

provisions.title: Not a legal holiday
provisions.content: 3 For greater certainty, National Sickle Cell Awareness Day is not a legal holiday or a non-juridical day.
